summary: Iteration 62: Phase 2 Internal Invoicing for branch-to-branch transfers - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All invoice features verified working correctly.

issues: Multiple React hydration warnings about span elements inside tr/tbody/th - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

INTERNAL_INVOICE_AUTO_CREATION.auto_created_on_transfer_create: PASS - Invoice auto-created when branch transfer is created
INTERNAL_INVOICE_AUTO_CREATION.invoice_linked_to_transfer: PASS - Transfer stores invoice_id and invoice_number
INTERNAL_INVOICE_AUTO_CREATION.stored_in_internal_invoices_collection: PASS - Stored in MongoDB internal_invoices collection

INVOICE_FIELDS.grand_total: PASS - Correctly calculated as sum of line_totals

API_ENDPOINTS.GET_internal_invoices: PASS - Lists all invoices with branch name enrichment
API_ENDPOINTS.GET_internal_invoices_summary: PASS - Returns payable/receivable totals with overdue/due_soon counts
API_ENDPOINTS.GET_internal_invoices_by_transfer_id: PASS - Returns linked invoice for transfer
API_ENDPOINTS.GET_internal_invoices_id: PASS - Returns single invoice with branch enrichment

INVOICE_STATUS_SYNC.status_prepared_on_create: PASS - Invoice status 'prepared' when transfer created
INVOICE_STATUS_SYNC.status_sent_on_transfer_send: PASS - Invoice status updates to 'sent' when transfer sent
INVOICE_STATUS_SYNC.status_received_on_transfer_receive: PASS - Invoice status updates to 'received' when transfer received
INVOICE_STATUS_SYNC.timestamps_updated: PASS - sent_at/received_at timestamps set on status changes

FRONTEND_TRANSFER_DETAIL_DIALOG.status_timeline: PASS - Shows Transfer Created → Sent → Received → Settled steps
FRONTEND_TRANSFER_DETAIL_DIALOG.request_po_reference: PASS - Shows 'from PO-xxx' when from stock request

HISTORY_LIST_DISPLAY.from_po_reference: PASS - Shows 'from TEST-PO' under order number for linked transfers
HISTORY_LIST_DISPLAY.invoice_number_display: VERIFIED - Invoice numbers in transfer data

PRINT_INVOICE_FEATURE.generates_printable_html: PASS - Generates complete printable invoice with all required sections

critical_code_review_comments: Internal invoices correctly auto-created via create_internal_invoice() function imported in branch_transfers.py
Invoice status updates via update_invoice_status() called on send_transfer and _apply_receipt
All invoice endpoints properly handle branch name enrichment for from_branch_id/to_branch_id
Summary endpoint correctly calculates payable (to_branch = current) and receivable (from_branch = current)
Frontend printTransferOrder() generates comprehensive invoice HTML with corrections box, signatures, and Actual Rcvd column
seed_data_creation: Created test transfer with auto-generated invoice INV-20260226-XXXX during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 62 verified Phase 2 Internal Invoicing features. Backend API for internal invoices fully functional: auto-creation on transfer, status sync, summary endpoint. Frontend shows invoice badge (INV-xxx), Terms: Net 15, Print Invoice button, and status timeline (Transfer Created → Sent → Received → Settled). History list shows 'from PO-xxx' for linked transfers. Print generates full invoice HTML with corrections space, Actual Rcvd column, and signature lines. All 14 backend tests pass. No mocked APIs.
